# fpcloud_project (Data Source)

Use this data source to read a Fogpipe project by ID or name.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The project ID. Provide either id or name.
- `name` (String) The project name. Provide either id or name.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp of the project.
- `display_name` (String) The display name of the project.
- `status` (String) The current status of the project.
